analysis.reasoning: Core message: An informational announcement that EU leaders will sign a joint declaration to launch the Conference on the Future of Europe during a formal sitting. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not promoted; the tweet does not reference past successes or lessons learned. EU2 (unity) – weakly implied by multiple EU leaders jointly signing a declaration, but the tweet is purely procedural with no explicit emphasis on unity or overcoming differences; implication is too minimal to code as promotion. EU3 (usefulness for citizens) – the Conference on the Future of Europe could be citizen-oriented, but the tweet does not state benefits or actions improving citizens' lives. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – no claim of pioneering leadership or tackling future challenges beyond a procedural step. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not mentioned. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not mentioned. Conclusion: This is a neutral institutional notice without narrative promotion.
